sources.summary: The actor plays the surly Charles Dickens character in Ti West's upcoming big screen adaptation The post Johnny Depp Surprises San Diego Comic-Con in Character as Ebenezer Scrooge appeared first on TheWrap .

sources.headline: Johnny Depp Makes Surprise Comic-Con Appearance as Ebenezer Scrooge
sources.summary: Johnny Depp made a surprise appearance at San Diego Comic-Con on Thursday — in his full Ebenezer Scrooge regalia. Depp plays Scrooge in the upcoming Paramount movie, Ebenezer, directed by Ti West, which debuts in theaters this November. sources.summary: The Beach Boys endless summer has run into a hitch. sources.headline: Johnny Depp Surprises At Comic-Con, Emerges As Scrooge To Promote Ebenezer Movie
sources.summary: Johnny Depp stole the spotlight at Comic-Con on Thursday, appearing in full Scrooge costume for his upcoming Ti West-directed movie Ebenezer. The appearance today by the three-time Oscar nominee came as part of a stunt in which the David Ellison-owned Paramount Pictures fired up a faux 1880s British Christmas village in San Diego s Gaslamp district.
